description: Deny rm -rf via PreToolUse permissionDecision (blocks even in bypassPermissions mode)

hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "rm[[:space:]]+-rf"; then jq -nc "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PreToolUse\",permissionDecision:\"deny\",permissionDecisionReason:\"rm -rf blocked by safety hook\"}}"; fi'
